text: The tasks "Extract chainsaw specifications from order" and "Create production order in ERP" are executed sequentially
The process executes the following branches in parallel
In parallel branch 1: The task "Order parts from online source #1" is executed
The process waits for "Parts from source #1 received"
In parallel branch 2: The task "Order parts from online source #2" is executed
The process waits for "Parts from source #2 received"
In parallel branch 3: The task "Order parts from online source #3" is executed
The process waits for "Parts from source #3 received"
The process then waits until all parallel branches are completed
The subprocess "Manually inspect all parts" is executed
Within the subprocess: The step "Perform visual inspection" is performed
The step "Perform functional test" is performed
The step "Document inspection results" is performed
The decision "All parts passed manual inspection?" is evaluated
If Electric, the task "Install electric motor" is executed
Otherwise, the task "Install combustion engine" is executed
The process executes the following branches in parallel
In parallel branch 1: The tasks "Assemble first chainsaw" and "Ship first chainsaw to customer" are executed sequentially
The process triggers the signal "First chainsaw shipped"
In parallel branch 2: The process waits for one of the following events to occur
If the event "First chainsaw shipped" occurs, the process waits for "First chainsaw shipped"
The decision "Customer approved first chainsaw?" is evaluated
If yes, the process executes the following branches in parallel
In parallel branch 1: The process waits for one of the following events to occur
If the event "1 hour" occurs, the process waits for "1 hour"
If the event "Remaining chainsaws produced" occurs, the process waits for "Remaining chainsaws produced"
The task "Ship remaining chainsaws to customer" is executed
The process ends "Order fulfilled"
In parallel branch 2: The task "Assemble remaining chainsaws" is executed
The process triggers the signal "Remaining chainsaws produced"
The process then waits until all parallel branches are completed
Otherwise, the task "Refund customer" is executed
The process ends "Order canceled"
If the event "1 hour" occurs, the process waits for "1 hour"
The process then waits until all parallel branches are completed
Otherwise, the task "Order replacement parts" is executed
The process loops back to the gateway
